chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-73 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2026. Mr. Haq Nawaz Jamari, Advocate for Petitioner alongwith Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh alongwith SIP / SHO Rasheed Ahmed Memon from PS A-Section Shaheed Benazirabad. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State. ***************************************** SHO PS A-Section Nawabshah (Shaheed Benazirabad) has produced the detenue Mst. Nagina alongwith his father Mehboob (Respondent No.9) and she submits that she had contracted marriage with Petitioner on account of free will and wish without any coercion of compulsion and now she intends to go with her husband (Petitioner) Dost Ali Solangi, who is also present in Court. Order accordingly. In view of above, the instant Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Ali.
